phases.name: Detect TestRatioOrCiMatrix from CI workflows or a tests dir

steps.name: RepoFacts ci/tests + TestRatioOrCiMatrix disjunction arm + two content_exists probes
steps.description: Extend RepoFacts with ci_workflows_url/tests_dir_url + a TestRatioOrCiMatrix detect arm firing on the DISJUNCTION (CI workflows present OR a tests/ dir present) in scraper-domain; harvest_repo probes contents/.github/workflows and contents/tests via the existing content_exists (no new effect method) and assembles the fuller RepoFacts — so a repo with CI workflows or a tests/ directory now yields the org.openlore.philosophy.test-driven candidate. The final detector; the 'test/source ratio > 0.5' precision (tree walk) is deferred.
criteria: RGSD-5 happy A: CI workflows -> test-driven candidate (scrape_repo_with_ci_workflows_derives_the_test_driven_candidate)
RGSD-5 happy B: tests/ dir -> test-driven candidate (scrape_repo_with_a_tests_directory_derives_the_test_driven_candidate)
RGSD-5 guardrail: neither CI nor tests -> no candidate (disjunction; stays green)
RGSD-1..4 + existing scrape suite stay green (default-404 contents); confidence stays 0.25
steps.implementation_notes: PURE (scraper-domain/detect.rs): (1) extend RepoFacts with `pub ci_workflows_url: Option<String>` (the .github/workflows dir url when present; None otherwise) and `pub tests_dir_url: Option<String>` (the tests/ dir url when present; None). Default both to None where parse_repo_facts builds body-facts; harvest fills them. (2) add the TestRatioOrCiMatrix arm to detect_signals ALONGSIDE the existing four arms: fire when `facts.ci_workflows_url.is_some() OR facts.tests_dir_url.is_some()` (the DISJUNCTION — guardrail pins that neither fires nothing). Emit Signal{ kind: SignalKind::TestRatioOrCiMatrix, value: <honest — e.g. "CI workflows present (.github/workflows)" when the CI disjunct fired, else "tests/ directory present">, source_url: <ci_workflows_url when CI fired, else tests_dir_url> }. Independent of the other arms. EFFECT (adapter-github/lib.rs): (3) in harvest_repo, after the RGSD-4 readme/docs probes: call content_exists(owner,repo,".github/workflows")? -> ci_workflows_url; call content_exists(owner,repo,"tests")? -> tests_dir_url (content_exists treats any 200 as present -> Some(url); a directory 200 returns a JSON array which the RGSD-4-fixed content_html_url resolves to a /tree/ URL). Set both on RepoFacts before detect_signals. Keep the union with parse_signals. Keep harvest_user unchanged. No new effect method is needed (reuse content_exists). client.rs: parse_repo_facts defaults the two new fields to None. Run cargo run -p xtask -- check-arch (stays 21). TEST PARADIGM (mandatory): DELIVER RED_UNIT — proptests for the TestRatioOrCiMatrix arm: fires iff ci_workflows_url.is_some() OR tests_dir_url.is_some(); CI-only fires (names CI, sourced at CI url), tests-only fires (names tests, sourced at tests url), neither yields none; independent of the other arms. Example-based is documented FALLBACK. Acceptance scenarios are pre-authored by DISTILL — do NOT rewrite them.

validation.reviewer: orchestrator (authored from the committed DESIGN doc + SPIKE) + automated quality gate
validation.review_verdict: APPROVED — automated quality gate PASS (single-step slice, 2 happy RED owned + 1 disjunction guardrail, ratio 1 step / 3 production files = 0.33, step ID valid, criteria <=5). Reuses content_exists (no new effect method). Specified by the RGSD design §1/§5 + the SPIKE (ripgrep .github/workflows + tests both 200 -> fires; Hello-World both 404 -> negative); the Phase-4 adversarial implementation review remains the substantive gate.
